## Checklist

- [ ] Confirmed the data are publicly downloadable
- [ ] Added a row to `data/dataset_catalog.csv` (status = proposed)
- [ ] Created `dataset_cards/<accession>.md` from the template
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_catalog.py`
- [ ] Opened a pull request

Comment below to claim this issue.
